title: Meningitis | Meningitis | CDC
text:
25 
Fungal Meningitis 
Fungal meningitis is uncommon, difficult to diagnose, and treated with antifungal medicines. 
Parasitic Meningitis 
Three parasites are the main causes of parasitic meningitis, which is uncommon and hard to diagnose. 
Amebic Meningitis 
Amebic meningitis is rare, difficult to diagnose, and usually deadly even with treatment. 
Healthcare providers 
Clinical Overview 
An overview of clinical features, diagnostics, and treatment for fungal meningitis. 
Learn More 
Sept. 9, 2025 
Meningitis 
Bacteria, viruses, parasites, and fungi can all cause meningitis.
